compiled_state.title: Update docs for 5 new ticket CLI subcommands (exists, list-epics, list-descendants, next-batch, ready)
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Task

Update project documentation to reflect all five new ticket CLI subcommands added by epic 2c28-e5b9.

## Files to Modify

### 1. `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md`

Add full entries (syntax, flags, output format, exit codes) for:
- `ticket exists <id>` — O(1) presence check; exit 0 if exists, 1 if not
- `ticket list-epics [--all] [--min-children=N] [--max-children=N] [--has-tag=TAG] [--without-tag=TAG]` — delegates to sprint-list-epics.sh; three-valued exit codes
- `ticket list-descendants <id>` — BFS walk returning JSON {epics:[...], stories:[...], tasks:[...], bugs:[...], parents_with_children:[...]}
- `ticket next-batch <epic-id> [--limit=N|unlimited] [--json]` — delegates to sprint-next-batch.sh; all SKIPPED_* tokens documented
- `ticket ready [--epic=<id>] [--story=<id>] [--format=llm]` — lists tickets with ready_to_work=true; O(N) scan

Follow the existing format in ticket-cli-reference.md for each entry (use the same structure as existing entries like `ticket list` and `ticket show`).

### 2. `CLAUDE.md` Quick Reference table

Add the five new subcommands to the ticket CLI quick reference where other ticket commands are listed (near `List ready tickets`, `Show ticket details`, etc.).

### 3. Dispatcher `_usage()` help text in `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket`

Find the _usage() function (or bare-invocation help block) and add the five new subcommands to the subcommand list so `ticket` without arguments shows them.

### 4. Check and update if needed

- `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md` — if it enumerates the dispatcher case statement
- `llms.txt` — if it enumerates ticket CLI subcommands

## Acceptance

- ticket-cli-reference.md has full entries for all 5 subcommands
- CLAUDE.md Quick Reference includes the 5 new subcommands
- Dispatcher _usage() lists the 5 new subcommands
- No new documentation files created (update existing only)
